title: Lastrea tenericaulis
taxonomy: Lastrea tenericaulis is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It belongs to the genus Lastrea, which is a group of ferns native to tropical and subtropical regions. The species Lastrea tenericaulis is classified as a terrestrial fern, meaning it grows on land rather than in water. More specifically, it is a type of epiphytic fern, which grows on other plants or surfaces for support. The classification of Lastrea tenericaulis reflects its unique growth habits and adaptations to its environment.
